title: Adorable Brown Elf Tastic Pooey Friends with Eyes - 14cm - Fun & Unique Collectible - Perfect for Kids & Humor Enthusiasts
features: EYE-CATCHING DESIGN: Our adorable brown elf tastic pooey friends stand out with their cute and funny appearances, ensuring smiles and laughter from children and humor enthusiasts alike.
HIGH-QUALITY: Feel the difference with our premium, squishy and stretchy material that's built to last, providing hours of entertainment and joy.
FUN AND INTERACTIVE: Enjoy the endless possibilities of playtime, as these adorable brown elf tastic pooey friends entertain children, spark creativity, and bring humor into any situation.
PERFECT GIFT: Delight your loved ones with these unique and hilarious collectibles, the ultimate present for birthdays, holidays, or simply to brighten someone's day.
STRESS RELIEF: Not just for kids, these 14cm Pooey Friends offer the perfect solution for adults seeking a playful and effective way to reduce stress and anxiety.
description: Toilet humor, this poop is squishy and stretchy. Perfect for kids and adults alike, a great form of stress relief. Made from fine yet quality materials to have its unique design.
